calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Vacated

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendants Person(S) Most Qualified And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearancy by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Barry Druschel's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendants Person(s) Most Qualified And For Sanctions is off calendar. Notice of Settlement of the entire case filed March 12, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
